40+ Integrations

Connect Your Entire Toolchain

CodeGraft integrates with the tools you already use. From source control to cloud infrastructure, from documentation to observability - we bring it all together.

Start Free TrialExplore Features

Bidirectional Sync

Not just read-only. Push updates back to your tools automatically.

Real-Time Updates

Webhook-driven updates ensure your knowledge graph is always current.

Enterprise Security

OAuth, SAML, and API key authentication with full audit logging.

Fully Extensible

Build custom integrations with our Plugin SDK and API.

Connect to all the tools that power your software development lifecycle.

Plugin SDK

Build Custom Integrations

Need to connect a proprietary system or build a custom scanner? Our Plugin SDK gives you full access to the CodeGraft platform with TypeScript-first APIs.

  • Full TypeScript SDK with comprehensive types
  • Access to the complete Graph API
  • Custom ingestion pipelines
  • Custom analysis rules and policies
  • Publish to the internal marketplace
View Documentation
plugin.config.ts
import { definePlugin } from '@codegraft/sdk';

export default definePlugin({
  name: 'custom-scanner',
  version: '1.0.0',

  async onIngest(context) {
    // Your custom ingestion logic
    const data = await fetchCustomSource();

    return context.addNodes(
      data.map(item => ({
        type: 'CustomEntity',
        properties: item,
      }))
    );
  },

  async onAnalyze(graph) {
    // Custom analysis rules
    return graph.findPatterns({
      type: 'Violation',
      rule: 'custom-policy',
    });
  },
});
